_doc: Audit mirror of admin recipients. Live source-of-truth is Cloudflare KV (admin:recipients:v1). The recipients-update workflow rewrites this file every time the admin saves changes through the dashboard. Hand-edits here are ignored unless you also write them into KV via `wrangler kv key put admin:recipients:v1 --binding=FARM_KV @recipients.json`.
_required_quorum: Live trade confirmations clear when ALL three required recipients reply with a Y-class message (yes/y/ok/go/confirm/...). One required N-class reply (no/n/hold/...) marks the run rejected.
